title: Broken road near primary school
description: Large potholes on the main village road are causing difficulty for students and two-wheelers.
remarks: Repair team has been notified and inspection is scheduled.

title: Irregular water supply
description: Tap water is available only for a short time in the morning and several houses are not receiving supply.
remarks: Pipeline issue is being checked by the water department.

title: Street light not working
description: The street light near the community hall has not been working for one week.

title: Drainage overflow near market
description: Wastewater is overflowing beside the weekly market area and creating sanitation problems.
remarks: Drain cleaned and waste removed by sanitation team.
